div.head: 432. Editorial Note
div.p: On December 13, 1963, the UN General Assembly unanimously adopted Resolution 1962 (XVIII), “Declaration of Legal Principles Governing the Activities of States in the Exploration and Use of Outer Space,” and Resolution 1963 (XVIII), “International Cooperation in the Peaceful Uses of Outer Space.” Both resolutions are printed in American Foreign Policy: Current Documents, 1963, pages 1087–1092.
